is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary had Medicare Part A 
coverage. (This is sometimes referred to as health insurance coverage — or Medicare HI coverage). 

CCW derives this variable by counting the number of months where the beneficiary had Part A 
coverage (i.e., the MDCR_ENTLMT_BUYIN_IND_XX variable equaled 1, A, 3, or C).
